classes.name: MusicgenMelodySinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: fixed (non-learned) sinusoidal positional embedding lookup; matches L1/sinusoidal_embed.py compute

classes.name: MusicgenMelodyAttention
classes.rationale: BART-style multi-head attention with separate q/k/v Linear+bias and out_proj; supports cross-attention via key_value_states; no kb-nano file matches the BART-decoder cross/self combo (closest is L2/whisper_attention.py but BART pattern uses dynamic dispatch via ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS, not paged KV); composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax (or L1/sdpa) + cross-attn variants

classes.name: MusicgenMelodyDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: LayerNorm + self_attn + dropout + LayerNorm + fc1 + activation + fc2 (causal decoder, no cross-attn — text+audio is concatenated upstream)

classes.name: MusicgenMelodyDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: per-codebook embeddings + sinusoidal pos + decoder layers + final LayerNorm

classes.name: MusicgenMelodyModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: MusicgenMelodyForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + per-codebook lm_heads

classes.name: MusicgenMelodyForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring: text encoder + audio encoder + decoder pipeline

classes.name: MvpLearnedPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: learned positional embedding with offset=2 (BART convention); maps to L1/embedding.py with bias offset

classes.name: MvpAttention
classes.rationale: BART-style multi-head attention with separate q/k/v Linear+bias, cross-attention support, attn_prompt support (MVP-specific prompt-tuning prefixes); composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax + L1/bmm; no direct kb-nano file (whisper_attention.py is closest but MVP eager forward uses bmm not paged-KV)

classes.name: MvpEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attn + LayerNorm + fc1+act+fc2 + LayerNorm (BART encoder layer)

classes.name: MvpDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attn + LayerNorm + cross_attn (encoder_attn) + LayerNorm + fc1+act+fc2 + LayerNorm (BART decoder layer)

classes.name: MvpClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear+tanh+Linear classification head; composes from L1/linear + L1/tanh

classes.name: MvpPrompt
classes.rationale: MVP-specific prompt tuning: Embedding + Linear+GELU+Linear sequential; composes from L1/embedding + L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: MvpEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: token+pos embed + LayerNorm + encoder layers

classes.name: MvpDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: token+pos embed + LayerNorm + decoder layers

classes.name: MvpModel
classes.rationale: wiring: encoder + decoder + shared embeddings

classes.name: MvpForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: MvpForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: MvpForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: MvpDecoderWrapper
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: MvpForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: NanoChatRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Llama4TextL2Norm is L2-normalisation along last dim (no learnable weights); matches L1/l2_norm.py F.normalize(p=2)

classes.name: NanoChatRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaRotaryEmbedding; standard NeoX-style RoPE

classes.name: NanoChatAttention
classes.rationale: inherits Qwen3Attention but reorders: q/k/v_proj -> RoPE -> q_norm/k_norm (RoPE-then-Norm, instead of standard Norm-then-RoPE); the L1/l2_norm-based qk_norm differs from kb-nano L2/attention.py qk_norm (RMSNorm) and from its ordering, so this is partial fit — composes attention.py with L2-norm post-RoPE

classes.name: NanoChatMLP
classes.rationale: two-layer fc1+act+fc2 (CLIPMLP shape) but bias=False and activation is configurable (config.hidden_act, default likely gelu/relu); not SwiGLU. CLIPMLP uses QuickGELU+bias=True so kb-nano L2/clip_mlp.py mismatches; composes from L1/linear + activation

classes.name: NanoChatDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_layernorm (L2Norm) + attn + post_attention_layernorm (L2Norm) + mlp

classes.name: NanoChatModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embeddings + extra L2Norm before layers + decoder layers + final L2Norm

classes.name: NanoChatForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: NemotronLayerNorm1P
classes.rationale: LayerNorm with weight+1 trick (Nemotron 1+gamma); composes from L1/layer_norm.py (no specialized kernel for the +1)

classes.name: NemotronRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: standard NeoX RoPE with optional partial_rotary_factor; computed from inv_freq + position_ids; matches L1/rotary_emb.py

classes.name: NemotronMLP
classes.rationale: two-linear MLP up_proj -> act_fn(squared-relu) -> down_proj; NOT SwiGLU (no gate_proj); kb-nano has L1/squared_relu.py but no L2 file for ungated squared-relu MLP — composes from L1/linear + L1/squared_relu

classes.name: NemotronAttention
classes.rationale: GQA attention with separate q/k/v_proj (no fused), partial RoPE (rope_dim=head_dim*partial_rotary_factor), no qk_norm; matches L2/attention.py (LlamaAttention) which supports GQA + RoPE; bias=config.attention_bias

classes.name: NemotronFlashAttention2
classes.rationale: FA2 backend variant of NemotronAttention (same parameters, different forward path); same kb-nano mapping

classes.name: NemotronSdpaAttention
classes.rationale: SDPA backend variant; same mapping

classes.name: NemotronDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: LayerNorm1P + self_attn + LayerNorm1P + mlp

classes.name: NemotronModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NemotronForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: NemotronForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NemotronForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NemotronForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NemotronHMamba2Mixer
classes.rationale: Zamba2-derived Mamba2 SSD mixer with in_proj + conv1d + Zamba2RMSNormGated + out_proj; matches L2/mamba2_mixer.py which uses vLLM's causal_conv1d/mamba_chunk_scan_combined_varlen + selective_state_update + rms_norm_gated

classes.name: NemotronHRMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: NemotronHMLP
classes.rationale: two-linear MLP up_proj -> act_fn -> down_proj (relu2 by default); no gating (NOT SwiGLU); composes from L1/linear + L1/squared_relu (or relu)

classes.name: NemotronHExperts
classes.rationale: non-gated MoE experts: up_proj 3D-tensor -> act_fn -> down_proj 3D-tensor (no gate_proj/up_proj fused). Differs from kb-nano L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py which assumes SwiGLU [gate_up, down]; composes by decomposing per-expert

classes.name: NemotronHMoE
classes.rationale: non-gated MoE with optional latent projection + shared expert (NemotronHMLP), differs from kb-nano L2/shared_expert_moe.py which assumes gated experts; composes

classes.name: NemotronHTopkRouter
classes.rationale: top-k router with sigmoid + correction bias (DeepSeek V3 style); routing pattern embedded inside L2/shared_expert_moe.py for SwiGLU experts but here used with non-gated experts

classes.name: NemotronHAttention
classes.rationale: JambaAttention is GQA self-attention with separate q/k/v + RoPE (Jamba uses rotary on subset of heads); maps to L2/attention.py (LlamaAttention) with appropriate config

classes.name: NemotronHBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: norm + mixer (mamba/attention/mlp/moe) dispatch + residual

classes.name: NemotronHModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NemotronHForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: NllbMoeScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: Embedding with output scaled by sqrt(hidden); composes from L1/embedding.py + scalar mul

classes.name: NllbMoeSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: fixed sinusoidal positional embedding (BART-style with offset=2); matches L1/sinusoidal_embed.py

classes.name: NllbMoeTop2Router
classes.rationale: Top-2 router with capacity-based expert assignment; routing logic does not match kb-nano's TopKSoftmax which is simple top-k; composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax

classes.name: NllbMoeDenseActDense
classes.rationale: single FFN expert: fc1 -> act -> fc2 (BART-style, NOT SwiGLU); composes from L1/linear + activation

classes.name: NllbMoeExperts
classes.rationale: ModuleDict of NllbMoeDenseActDense experts iterated per-expert; does not match kb-nano fused-experts grouped GEMM (which assumes gated SwiGLU); composes

classes.name: NllbMoeSparseMLP
classes.rationale: wiring: router + experts (top-2 capacity-based); does not match L2/mixtral_moe.py (top-k softmax + grouped gemm SwiGLU)

classes.name: NllbMoeAttention
classes.rationale: BART-style multi-head attention with separate q/k/v Linear+bias supporting cross-attention; composes from L1/linear + L1/sdpa or L1/softmax

classes.name: NllbMoeEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attn + LayerNorm + dense FFN or sparse MLP (alternating)

classes.name: NllbMoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attn + cross_attn + dense FFN or sparse MLP

classes.name: NllbMoeEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NllbMoeDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NllbMoeModel
classes.rationale: wiring: shared embed + encoder + decoder

classes.name: NllbMoeForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: NomicBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: JinaEmbeddingsV3Embeddings is word + token_type + LayerNorm (NO position embedding — RoPE is applied at attention layer); doesn't match EncoderEmbeddingsBase which adds position embeddings; composes from L1/embedding + L1/layer_norm

classes.name: NomicBertRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard NeoX RoPE

classes.name: NomicBertAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-encoder-style bi-directional attention with RoPE applied at attention layer; separate q/k/v Linear (bias=False here, vs True in parent); kb-nano L2/encoder_attention.py has no RoPE support, L2/attention.py is causal/decoder; composes from L1/linear + L1/rotary_emb + L1/sdpa (non-causal)

classes.name: NomicBertMLP
classes.rationale: GemmaMLP is SwiGLU (gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj + SiLU); matches L2/llama_mlp.py

classes.name: NomicBertLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: post-norm pattern with attn + LayerNorm, mlp + LayerNorm

classes.name: NomicBertModel
classes.rationale: wiring: embeddings + rotary_emb + encoder layers + (optional) pooler

classes.name: NomicBertPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + LayerNorm; composes

classes.name: NomicBertOnlyMLMHead
classes.rationale: wiring: transform + decoder linear

classes.name: NomicBertForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NomicBertForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NomicBertForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NystromformerEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word+pos+token_type embeddings + LayerNorm; matches EncoderEmbeddingsBase pattern (with offset=2 on position_ids per Nystromformer init)

classes.name: NystromformerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Nystrom-approximation attention: Moore-Penrose pseudo-inverse via iterative Z_0 method + 3 softmax kernels + optional depthwise Conv2d skip; this is a non-standard sparse attention pattern with no kb-nano analog; composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax + L1/conv2d

classes.name: NystromformerSelfOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-output (Linear + dropout + LayerNorm + residual); matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: NystromformerAttention
classes.rationale: wiring class around NystromformerSelfAttention + NystromformerSelfOutput (rule 11 — bare *Attention with sibling *SelfAttention)

classes.name: NystromformerIntermediate
classes.rationale: BERT-style Linear + activation; matches EncoderIntermediate

classes.name: NystromformerOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style Linear + LayerNorm + residual; matches EncoderOutput

classes.name: NystromformerLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: attention + intermediate + output

classes.name: NystromformerEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of layers

classes.name: NystromformerPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + LayerNorm; composes

classes.name: NystromformerLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: transform + decoder linear; composes

classes.name: NystromformerOnlyMLMHead
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NystromformerModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NystromformerForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NystromformerClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear + tanh + Linear classification head; composes

classes.name: NystromformerForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NystromformerForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NystromformerForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: NystromformerForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OlmoLayerNorm
classes.rationale: non-parametric LayerNorm (no weight, no bias, fp32 internally); composes from L1/layer_norm.py with elementwise_affine=False

classes.name: OlmoMLP
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaMLP; SwiGLU gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj + SiLU; matches L2/llama_mlp.py

classes.name: OlmoRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: LlamaRotaryEmbedding with cos/sin returned as float32 (instead of input dtype); same compute as L1/rotary_emb.py

classes.name: OlmoAttention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention with optional clip_qkv (clamp q/k/v to +/-clip_qkv); kb-nano L2/attention.py supports the basic GQA + RoPE pattern; clip_qkv pre-projection clamp is not part of kb-nano L2/attention.py — partial fit, composes attention.py with extra clamp

classes.name: OlmoDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: OlmoLayerNorm + attn + OlmoLayerNorm + mlp

classes.name: OlmoModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OlmoForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: OlmoForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: Olmo2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: RMSNorm with multiplication-before-cast ordering; standard L1/rms_norm.py compute

classes.name: Olmo2RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard NeoX RoPE

classes.name: Olmo2Attention
classes.rationale: OlmoAttention with q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm applied to full (heads*head_dim) projections (NOT per-head); kb-nano L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention supports qk_norm but per-head head_dim — Olmo2's full-tensor norm is a slight numerical variant; composes attention.py

classes.name: Olmo2DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: post-norm pattern (attn + post_attention_layernorm + residual, mlp + post_feedforward_layernorm + residual)

classes.name: Olmo2Model
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: Olmo2ForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: Olmo2ForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: Olmo3RMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: Olmo3Attention
classes.rationale: Olmo2Attention with sliding window for 3-of-4 layers; kb-nano L2/attention.py supports sliding_window per-layer (GPT-OSS-style)

classes.name: Olmo3DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: empty subclass; same wiring as Olmo2

classes.name: Olmo3RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Gemma2RotaryEmbedding is standard NeoX RoPE; matches L1/rotary_emb.py

classes.name: Olmo3Model
classes.rationale: wiring class with sliding+full attn mask routing per-layer

classes.name: Olmo3ForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: Olmo3ForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OlmoHybridRMSNormGated
classes.rationale: RMSNorm fused with gating (silu(gate)*norm(x)); matches L1/rms_norm_gated.py used by GatedDeltaNet

classes.name: OlmoHybridRMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: OlmoHybridShortConvolution
classes.rationale: depthwise causal Conv1d with cached state for streaming; matches L1/causal_conv1d.py (causal_conv1d_fn / causal_conv1d_update used in Mamba mixers)

classes.name: OlmoHybridAttention
classes.rationale: Olmo3Attention with optional NoPE mode (skip RoPE when position_embeddings is None); kb-nano L2/attention.py supports both nope=True/False

classes.name: OlmoHybridRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: RoPE returning float32 cos/sin; matches L1/rotary_emb.py

classes.name: OlmoHybridGatedDeltaNet
classes.rationale: GatedDeltaNet linear attention with q/k/v conv1d + chunk_gated_delta_rule (or fused_recurrent_gated_delta_rule for decode) + RMSNormGated output; uses kb-nano L1/chunk_gated_delta_rule.py + L1/causal_conv1d.py for the conv path + L1/rms_norm_gated.py — composes (no L2 wrapper exists for this exact variant; closest is L2/qwen3_next_gdn_attention.py)

classes.name: OlmoHybridMLP
classes.rationale: Olmo3MLP is SwiGLU; matches L2/llama_mlp.py

classes.name: OlmoHybridAttentionDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: full-attention layer (post-norm)

classes.name: OlmoHybridLinearAttentionDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm + linear_attn (GatedDeltaNet) + post_attention_layernorm + mlp

classes.name: OlmoHybridModel
classes.rationale: wiring: hybrid stack with linear_attention or full_attention layers

classes.name: OlmoHybridForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: OlmoeRMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: OlmoeRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard NeoX RoPE

classes.name: OlmoeMLP
classes.rationale: GemmaMLP is SwiGLU; matches L2/llama_mlp.py

classes.name: OlmoeAttention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention with qk_norm RMSNorm applied to full hidden_size projections (q_norm: hidden_size, k_norm: num_kv_heads*head_dim) and optional clip_qkv + sliding_window; matches L2/attention.py with qk_norm and sliding_window options

classes.name: OlmoeExperts
classes.rationale: MixtralExperts is grouped-GEMM SwiGLU experts; matches L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py

classes.name: OlmoeTopKRouter
classes.rationale: Qwen2MoeTopKRouter is softmax top-k router; routing pattern embedded inside L2/mixtral_moe.py via L1/topk_softmax.py

classes.name: OlmoeSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: softmax top-k routing + grouped-GEMM SwiGLU experts (no shared expert); matches MixtralMoE pattern

classes.name: OlmoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm + attn + pre-norm + sparse_moe_block

classes.name: OlmoeModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OlmoeForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: MultiScaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: deformable-DETR multi-scale sampling kernel; matches L1/rtdetrv2_deformable_attention.py

classes.name: OmDetTurboLanguageBackbone
classes.rationale: wiring around CLIPTextModel-derived language encoder

classes.name: OmDetTurboVisionBackbone
classes.rationale: wiring around vision backbone (Swin)

classes.name: OmDetTurboMultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: wraps MultiScaleDeformableAttention with sampling_offsets/attention_weights/value_proj/output_proj projections; matches L2/rtdetrv2_deformable_attention.py:RTDetrV2DeformableAttention pattern

classes.name: OmDetTurboConvNormLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + activation; matches L2/rtdetrv2_conv_norm.py (RT-DETR copy)

classes.name: OmDetTurboRepVggBlock
classes.rationale: RepVGG block (3x3 + 1x1 conv merge); matches L2/rtdetrv2_repvgg_block.py

classes.name: OmDetTurboCSPRepLayer
classes.rationale: CSP layer with RepVGG bottlenecks; matches L2/rtdetrv2_csp_rep_layer.py

classes.name: OmDetTurboMultiheadAttention
classes.rationale: vanilla Q/K/V Linear + softmax + dropout MHA (DETR-style with manual q/k/v projections); matches L2/rtdetrv2_multihead_attention.py

classes.name: OmDetTurboEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn + LayerNorm + fc1+act+fc2 + LayerNorm; matches L2/rtdetrv2_encoder_layer.py

classes.name: OmDetTurboEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of encoder layers

classes.name: OmDetTurboHybridEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: hybrid (CNN+Transformer) feature pyramid encoder

classes.name: OmDetTurboMLPWithDropout
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + dropout + Linear; composes from L1

classes.name: OmDetTurboMLP
classes.rationale: stacked Linear+activation MLP head (DETR-style); matches L2/rtdetrv2_mlp_head.py

classes.name: OmDetTurboResidualLayer
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm + residual; composes

classes.name: OmDetTurboTaskEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: task-specific MLPs

classes.name: OmDetTurboDeformableTransformerDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attn + cross_attn (deformable) + linear+act+linear FFN with LayerNorms

classes.name: OmDetTurboDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of deformable decoder layers

classes.name: OmDetTurboForObjectDetection
classes.rationale: wiring: vision backbone + language backbone + hybrid encoder + decoder + task encoder

classes.name: OneFormerHungarianMatcher
classes.rationale: loss-only Hungarian matching; not a kernel

classes.name: OneFormerLoss
classes.rationale: loss function; not a forward kernel

classes.name: OneFormerPixelDecoderEncoderMultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: deformable DETR multi-scale attention (sampling_offsets+attention_weights+value_proj+output_proj); same op as L1/rtdetrv2_deformable_attention.py

classes.name: OneFormerPixelDecoderEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: deformable self_attn + linear+act+linear FFN + LayerNorms

classes.name: OneFormerPixelDecoderEncoderOnly
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of encoder layers

classes.name: OneFormerPixelDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring class for FPN-style pixel decoder

classes.name: OneFormerPixelLevelModule
classes.rationale: wiring: vision encoder + pixel decoder

classes.name: OneFormerAttention
classes.rationale: DETR-style MHA with positional embeddings added to q/k pre-projection; separate q/k/v Linear + bmm + softmax; composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax + L1/bmm

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerDecoderSelfAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: OneFormerAttention + LayerNorm + dropout

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerDecoderCrossAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: OneFormerAttention (cross) + LayerNorm + dropout

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerDecoderFFNLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: Linear + activation + Linear + LayerNorm

classes.name: OneFormerMLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: stacked Linear MLP head; composes

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: cross_attn + self_attn + ffn

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerDecoderQueryTransformerDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of query-transformer decoder layers

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerDecoderQueryTransformerDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self/cross attn + LayerNorms + linear+act+linear

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerDecoderQueryTransformer
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of transformer decoder layers

classes.name: OneFormerTransformerModule
classes.rationale: wiring: query embeddings + transformer decoder

classes.name: OneFormerSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: DETR-style 2D sin/cos positional embedding; closest to L1/sinusoidal_embed.py compute

classes.name: PredictionBlock
classes.rationale: Linear + activation; composes

classes.name: OneFormerTextMapperAttention
classes.rationale: Q/K/V Linear (qkv-fused) + softmax MHA for text-mapper; composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax

classes.name: OneFormerTextTransformerDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: text-mapper attn + LayerNorms + FFN

classes.name: OneFormerTextContextDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of text-context decoder layers

classes.name: OneFormerTextMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + QuickGELU + fc2; matches L2/clip_mlp.py:CLIPMLP

classes.name: OneFormerTextTransformerLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: nn.MultiheadAttention + LayerNorm + OneFormerTextMLP + LayerNorm (CLIP-text-style with MultiheadAttention; the actual MHA is via torch's nn.MultiheadAttention which decomposes to L1/linear + L1/softmax)

classes.name: OneFormerTextTransformer
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of text-transformer layers

classes.name: OneFormerTextEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: token embed + position param + transformer + ln_final

classes.name: OneFormerTextMapper
classes.rationale: wiring: text encoder + context decoder + projection heads

classes.name: OneFormerTaskModel
classes.rationale: wiring: prediction blocks for task encoding

classes.name: OneFormerModel
classes.rationale: wiring: pixel + transformer + text-mapper

classes.name: OneFormerForUniversalSegmentation
classes.rationale: wiring + class/mask heads

classes.name: Attention
classes.rationale: GPT-1 attention with Conv1D (=fused qkv linear that splits into Q/K/V) + manual scaled dot-prod with absolute upper-triangular mask buffer + softmax + attn-dropout + Conv1D out_proj; composes from L1/linear (Conv1D is just nn.Linear with transposed weight) + L1/softmax + L1/bmm

classes.name: MLP
classes.rationale: Conv1D fc + activation (GELU) + Conv1D proj + dropout; two-linear MLP, NOT SwiGLU; composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: Block
classes.rationale: wiring: attn + LayerNorm + mlp + LayerNorm (GPT-1 post-norm)

classes.name: OpenAIGPTSequenceSummary
classes.rationale: linear + activation pooling head; composes

classes.name: OpenAIGPTModel
classes.rationale: wiring: tokens + position embed + dropout + Block stack

classes.name: OpenAIGPTLMHeadModel
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: OpenAIGPTDoubleHeadsModel
classes.rationale: wiring + dual heads

classes.name: OpenAIGPTForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterRMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass of GptOssRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: GptOssRotaryEmbedding is YaRN-NeoX RoPE (config.rope_parameters['rope_type']='yarn'); matches L1/yarn_rotary_emb.py

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterAttention
classes.rationale: GptOss-style attention with attention sinks + sliding window + bidirectional (is_causal=False); per-Q,K scaling applied separately (head_dim**-0.25 each side); kb-nano L2/gpt_oss_attention.py is the dedicated GPT-OSS attention with sinks (note: bidirectional vs causal differs slightly, but kernel ops match)

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterExperts
classes.rationale: GptOssExperts is MXFP4-quantized expert bank with gate_up + down + per-expert bias; OpenAIPrivacyFilter overrides _apply_gate to use chunked layout; same kernel family as L1/mxfp4_moe.py (or non-quantized fp32 fallback path; depends on checkpoint)

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterTopKRouter
classes.rationale: linear gate (fp32) + topk + softmax + scaling; routing pattern embedded inside L2/gpt_oss_moe.py

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterMLP
classes.rationale: router + experts wiring (no shared expert); matches L2/gpt_oss_moe.py:GPTOssMoE pattern (with extra num_experts scaling)

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm + attn + pre-norm + moe-mlp

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterModel
classes.rationale: wiring: bidirectional sliding-window encoder stack

classes.name: OpenAIPrivacyFilterForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OPTLearnedPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: learned positional embedding with offset=2 (BART-style); maps to L1/embedding.py

classes.name: OPTAttention
classes.rationale: BART-decoder-style causal self-attention with separate q/k/v Linear (config.enable_bias) + LayerNorm-pre-attn (in layer); no RoPE, no GQA; kb-nano L2/attention.py assumes RoPE+GQA — OPT uses absolute pos via OPTLearnedPositionalEmbedding instead of RoPE; partial fit, composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax + L1/sdpa (causal)

classes.name: OPTDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: optional pre/post attn LayerNorm + self_attn + (configurable do_layer_norm_before) + fc1 + activation (relu) + fc2 + LayerNorm

classes.name: OPTDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: token embed + learned position embed + optional project_in/out + decoder layers + (optional) final LayerNorm

classes.name: OPTModel
classes.rationale: wiring class around decoder

classes.name: OPTForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: OPTForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OPTForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: Ovis2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: Ovis2VisionMLP
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaMLP; SwiGLU

classes.name: Ovis2VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embed + RMSNorm + position embedding (no class token); composes from L1/conv2d + L1/embedding + L1/rms_norm

classes.name: Ovis2VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Aimv2Attention inherits SiglipAttention (separate q/k/v + dense attention, non-causal); matches L2/siglip_attention.py:SigLIPAttention

classes.name: Ovis2VisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: rms_norm1 -> attention -> rms_norm2 -> ffn (Aimv2-style)

classes.name: Ovis2VisionEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of encoder layers

classes.name: Ovis2VisionTransformer
classes.rationale: wiring: embeddings + encoder + final RMSNorm

classes.name: Ovis2VisualEmbeddingTable
classes.rationale: Embedding that supports both integer (lookup) and float (matmul) inputs; composes from L1/embedding + L1/linear (matmul)

classes.name: Ovis2VisionModel
classes.rationale: wiring: vision transformer + head_linear + head_norm + tokenize_function (gumbel/argmax/softmax)

classes.name: Ovis2Model
classes.rationale: wiring: vision_tower + visual_embeddings_table + language_model

classes.name: Ovis2ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: Owlv2VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embed + class token + learned position embedding; composes from L1/conv2d + L1/embedding

classes.name: Owlv2TextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: [v2 fix] token + position embeddings (CLIP-style); composes from L1/embedding.py + L1/layer_norm.py.

classes.name: Owlv2Attention
classes.rationale: CLIP-style separate q/k/v Linear + manual scaled dot-prod softmax (non-causal for vision; causal for text); matches L2/clip_attention.py:CLIPAttention

classes.name: Owlv2MLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + activation (QuickGELU per CLIP convention) + fc2; matches L2/clip_mlp.py:CLIPMLP

classes.name: Owlv2EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln + attn + ln + mlp (CLIP encoder pattern)

classes.name: Owlv2Encoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of encoder layers

classes.name: Owlv2TextTransformer
classes.rationale: wiring: text embeddings + encoder + final LayerNorm

classes.name: Owlv2TextModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: Owlv2VisionTransformer
classes.rationale: wiring: vision embeddings + pre-LayerNorm + encoder + post-LayerNorm

classes.name: Owlv2VisionModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: Owlv2Model
classes.rationale: wiring: text + vision + projection heads

classes.name: Owlv2BoxPredictionHead
classes.rationale: stacked Linear+activation MLP head; composes

classes.name: Owlv2ClassPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear projection head; composes

classes.name: Owlv2ForObjectDetection
classes.rationale: wiring: model + box/class heads

classes.name: OwlViTVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embed + class token + learned position embedding; composes from L1/conv2d + L1/embedding

classes.name: OwlViTTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: [v2 fix] token + position embeddings (CLIP-style); composes from L1/embedding.py + L1/layer_norm.py.

classes.name: OwlViTAttention
classes.rationale: CLIP-style separate q/k/v Linear + manual scaled dot-prod softmax; matches L2/clip_attention.py

classes.name: OwlViTMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + activation + fc2 (CLIP MLP); matches L2/clip_mlp.py

classes.name: OwlViTEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln + attn + ln + mlp

classes.name: OwlViTEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of encoder layers

classes.name: OwlViTTextTransformer
classes.rationale: wiring: text embeddings + encoder + final LayerNorm

classes.name: OwlViTTextModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OwlViTVisionTransformer
classes.rationale: wiring: vision embeddings + pre-LayerNorm + encoder + post-LayerNorm

classes.name: OwlViTVisionModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: OwlViTModel
classes.rationale: wiring: text + vision + projection

classes.name: OwlViTBoxPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear MLP head; composes

classes.name: OwlViTClassPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear head; composes

classes.name: OwlViTForObjectDetection
classes.rationale: wiring: model + heads

classes.name: PaddleOCRProjector
classes.rationale: vision-to-text projector: pre-norm + linear + GELU + linear (with spatial merge); composes from L1/layer_norm + L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: PaddleOCRVisionRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: VisionRotaryEmbedding is 2D vision RoPE (Qwen2VL style); matches L1/vision_rotary_emb.py

classes.name: PaddleOCRRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Qwen2VLRotaryEmbedding is M-RoPE (multimodal RoPE for Qwen-VL); matches L1/mrope.py

classes.name: PaddleOCRMLP
classes.rationale: Ernie4_5MLP is SwiGLU (gate+up+down + SiLU); matches L2/llama_mlp.py

classes.name: PaddleOCRAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen2_5OmniAttention with separate q/k/v_proj + M-RoPE (multimodal); maps to L2/attention.py with mrope-aware rotary_emb

classes.name: PaddleOCRRMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: PaddleOCRDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm + attn + pre-norm + mlp

classes.name: PaddleOCRTextModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: PaddleOCRVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embed + interpolated learned position embeddings (per-image grid); composes

classes.name: PaddleOCRVisionAttention
classes.rationale: VideoLlama3VisionAttention is varlen vision attention with cu_seqlens (Qwen2VL family); matches L2/vision_attention.py

classes.name: PaddleOCRVisionMLP
classes.rationale: SiglipMLP is fc1+GELU+fc2; the SigLIP-style MLP for vision encoders; matches L2/vision_mlp.py

classes.name: PaddleOCRVisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln + attn + ln + mlp

classes.name: PaddleOCRVisionEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of encoder layers + 2D RoPE

classes.name: PaddleOCRVisionTransformer
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: PaddleOCRVisionModel
classes.rationale: wiring class

classes.name: PaddleOCRVLModel
classes.rationale: wiring: vision + projector + language model

classes.name: PaddleOCRVLForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: PaliGemmaMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: single Linear projection from vision_hidden -> projection_dim; composes from L1/linear

classes.name: PaliGemmaModel
classes.rationale: wiring: vision_tower (SigLIP) + projector + language_model (Gemma2)

classes.name: PaliGemmaForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring + lm_head

classes.name: ParakeetEncoderRelPositionalEncoding
classes.rationale: Transformer-XL-style relative positional encoding with interleaved sin/cos and reverse position_ids; sinusoidal-derived; closest to L1/sinusoidal_embed.py compute

classes.name: ParakeetEncoderFeedForward
classes.rationale: Conformer FFN: linear1 + activation + dropout + linear2 (no gating); composes from L1/linear + activation

classes.name: ParakeetEncoderConvolutionModule
classes.rationale: Conformer convolution module: pointwise conv + GLU + depthwise conv + BatchNorm + activation + pointwise conv; composes from L1/conv1d + L1/batch_norm (no L2 wrapper for conformer conv)

classes.name: ParakeetEncoderAttention
classes.rationale: Transformer-XL relative-position attention: separate q/k/v + relative_k_proj + bias_u/bias_v parameters + _rel_shift trick; not standard RoPE attention; kb-nano L2/attention.py only handles RoPE; composes from L1/linear + L1/sdpa with custom relative-bias term

classes.name: ParakeetEncoderSubsamplingConv2D
classes.rationale: stacked Conv2d + ReLU + Conv2d + Linear subsampling stem; composes from L1/conv2d + L1/relu + L1/linear

classes.name: ParakeetEncoderBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: ff1 + self_attn + conv + ff2 + LayerNorms (Conformer block)

classes.name: ParakeetEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: subsampling + rel-pos + encoder layers

classes.name: ParakeetForCTC
classes.rationale: wiring + Conv1d CTC head

classes.name: PatchTSMixerGatedAttention
classes.rationale: Linear + softmax gate * input (channel/feature gating, not multi-head attn); composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax

classes.name: PatchTSMixerBatchNorm
classes.rationale: BatchNorm1d wrapper (along time dim); closest match L1/batch_norm2d.py family (1D variant)

classes.name: PatchTSMixerPositionalEncoding
classes.rationale: either learned (Parameter) or sinusoidal positional encoding; composes

classes.name: PatchTSMixerNormLayer
classes.rationale: LayerNorm or BatchNorm wrapper; composes

classes.name: PatchTSMixerMLP
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + dropout + Linear; composes from L1/linear

classes.name: PatchTSMixerChannelFeatureMixerBlock
classes.rationale: TSMixer channel-mixing block: norm + transpose + MLP + transpose; composes

classes.name: PatchTSMixerAttention
classes.rationale: BART-style attention with separate q/k/v + bias; composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax

classes.name: PatchMixerBlock
classes.rationale: patch-dim mixing block: norm + MLP (+ optional gated_attn / self_attn); wiring

classes.name: FeatureMixerBlock
classes.rationale: feature-dim mixing block: norm + MLP (+ optional gated_attn); wiring

classes.name: PatchTSMixerLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: PatchMixer + FeatureMixer + ChannelFeatureMixer (mode-dependent)

classes.name: PatchTSMixerBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of PatchTSMixerLayer

classes.name: PatchTSMixerForPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear prediction head; composes

classes.name: PatchTSMixerLinearHead
classes.rationale: Linear classification/regression head; composes

classes.name: PatchTSMixerPretrainHead
classes.rationale: Linear pretrain head; composes

classes.name: PatchTSMixerPatchify
classes.rationale: patchifies time series into windows; reshape op only

classes.name: PatchTSMixerMasking
classes.rationale: random masking; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSMixerStdScaler
classes.rationale: z-score scaler; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSMixerMeanScaler
classes.rationale: mean scaler; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSMixerNOPScaler
classes.rationale: no-op scaler; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSMixerEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: input projection + positional encoding + mixer block

classes.name: PatchTSMixerModel
classes.rationale: wiring: scaler + patchify + (optional masking) + encoder

classes.name: PatchTSMixerForPretraining
classes.rationale: wiring + pretrain head

classes.name: PatchTSMixerForPrediction
classes.rationale: wiring + prediction head

classes.name: PatchTSMixerForTimeSeriesClassification
classes.rationale: wiring + classification head

classes.name: InjectScalerStatistics4D
classes.rationale: Linear post-processing for scaler stats; composes

classes.name: PatchTSMixerForRegression
classes.rationale: wiring + regression head

classes.name: PatchTSTAttention
classes.rationale: BART-style multi-head attention (separate q/k/v Linear+bias) with cross-attention support; composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax

classes.name: PatchTSTBatchNorm
classes.rationale: BatchNorm1d on transposed input; closest L1/batch_norm2d.py family (1D variant)

classes.name: PatchTSTPatchify
classes.rationale: patchifies time series; reshape op only

classes.name: PatchTSTMasking
classes.rationale: random masking; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSTEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: norm + attn + norm + ffn

classes.name: PatchTSTEmbedding
classes.rationale: Linear projection from patch_size -> d_model; composes

classes.name: PatchTSTPositionalEncoding
classes.rationale: learned or sinusoidal positional encoding; composes

classes.name: PatchTSTEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of encoder layers

classes.name: PatchTSTStdScaler
classes.rationale: z-score scaler; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSTMeanScaler
classes.rationale: mean scaler; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSTNOPScaler
classes.rationale: no-op scaler; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSTScaler
classes.rationale: scaler wrapper; non-kernel

classes.name: PatchTSTModel
classes.rationale: wiring: scaler + patchify + masking + embedding + encoder

classes.name: PatchTSTMaskPretrainHead
classes.rationale: Linear pretrain head; composes

classes.name: PatchTSTForPretraining
classes.rationale: wiring + pretrain head

classes.name: PatchTSTClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout classification head; composes

classes.name: PatchTSTForClassification
classes.rationale: wiring + cls head

classes.name: PatchTSTPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Linear prediction head; composes

classes.name: PatchTSTForPrediction
classes.rationale: wiring + prediction head

classes.name: PatchTSTRegressionHead
classes.rationale: Linear regression head; composes

classes.name: PatchTSTForRegression
classes.rationale: wiring + regression head

classes.name: PeAudioDacEncoderBlock
classes.rationale: DAC encoder block: conv1d + Snake activation + residual; closest match is L1/conv1d.py + custom Snake1d (no kb-nano file for Snake)

classes.name: PeAudioDacEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of DAC encoder blocks

classes.name: PeAudioEncoderEmbedder
classes.rationale: wiring: DAC encoder + bottleneck Conv1d + data Linear projection

classes.name: PeAudioContrastiveHead
classes.rationale: wiring: LayerNorm + Linear; composes

classes.name: PeAudioEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: embedder + patch_embedder + encoder layers + RoPE + final norm + output (CLS-token pooling)

classes.name: PeAudioModel
classes.rationale: wiring: text + audio encoders + contrastive heads

classes.name: PeAudioFrameLevelModel
classes.rationale: wiring + frame-level audio embeds

classes.name: PeAudioVideoMaskedGroupNorm
classes.rationale: GroupNorm with optional padding mask (skip masked positions in mean/var); closest L1/group_norm.py + masking layer

classes.name: PeAudioVideoConvBlock1d
classes.rationale: MaskedGroupNorm + SiLU + Conv1d (kernel=3); composes

classes.name: PeAudioVideoResnetBlock1d
classes.rationale: wiring: 2x ConvBlock1d + residual

classes.name: PeAudioVideoEncoderPatchEmbedder
classes.rationale: wiring: prepend class token + ResnetBlock1d

classes.name: PeAudioVideoContrastiveHead
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear; composes from L1/layer_norm + L1/linear

classes.name: PeAudioVideoEncoderEmbedder
classes.rationale: wiring: audio + video encoders + cross-modality projection

classes.name: PeAudioVideoEncoderAttention
classes.rationale: Qwen3Attention with bidirectional (is_causal=False) + qk_norm + custom rotary application (stack_freqs); kb-nano L2/attention.py supports qk_norm but the custom rotary layout differs; partial fit composing attention.py

classes.name: PeAudioVideoEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm + attn + pre-norm + mlp

classes.name: PeAudioVideoEncoderRMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: PeAudioVideoEncoderRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard NeoX RoPE (used with custom apply_rotary_pos_emb that interleaves cos/sin)

classes.name: PeAudioVideoEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: embedder + patch_embedder + RoPE + encoder layers + final norm + output projection

classes.name: PeAudioVideoModel
classes.rationale: wiring: text encoder + AV encoder + contrastive heads
